name: High Cultist Vexthar the Consumed
description: The corrupted priest stands before the portal, shadow energy swirling around him!

enemies.description_override: A writhing tendril of shadow corruption
A writhing tendril of shadow corruption

reinforcements.message: Vexthar channels the portal's power, manifesting more Blight horrors to his defense!

final_boss_defeated.display_message: Vexthar collapses, shadow corruption pouring from his body like smoke. 'Impossible...' he gasps, blood on his lips. 'The Blight... promised... immortality...' His eyes clear for just a moment - human again - before going dark forever. The portal behind him shudders, cracks spreading across its surface. With a thunderous implosion, it collapses completely. You've done it. You've defeated the High Cultist and sealed the portal. Redstone is safe. The world is safe. For now.

terror_in_redstone_complete.display_message: The Terror in Redstone is over.

special_rules.description: Vexthar is a legendary-tier threat empowered by the Shadow Blight
All characters take 1d4 necrotic damage at the start of each turn while near Vexthar
Vexthar gains bonus damage and temp HP when standing near the portal
If marcus_redeemed flag is set, Vexthar has reduced max HP and damage (Marcus's sabotage weakened the portal)
If marcus_fled flag is set, Vexthar is enraged and more dangerous (his lieutenant betrayed him)
Vexthar can summon Blight spawn reinforcements during combat

ambient_description: High Cultist Vexthar stands before the massive portal, arms raised. Shadow corruption oozes from the Aethel portal-stone, and the air itself feels wrong - reality warping under the Blight's presence. Vexthar's eyes are completely black, his veins visible as dark lines under pale skin. When he speaks, multiple voices echo from his throat - his own, and the whispers of the Shadow Blight itself. 'Ah. The meddlers have arrived. How fortuitous. The ritual requires blood sacrifice, and you will serve admirably.' The final battle begins.
victory_description: High Cultist Vexthar the Consumed falls to his knees, shadow corruption leaving his body in wisps of dark smoke. For just a moment, his eyes clear - they're blue again, human again. 'What... have I... become?' he gasps. Then he's gone. The portal behind him shudders violently. Without Vexthar to anchor it, the ancient Aethel mechanism begins to fail. Cracks spread across the portal-stone's surface like breaking glass. Then, with a sound like reality healing, it seals completely. Silence falls over the chamber. The oppressive shadow energy is gone. Sunlight - actual sunlight - begins to filter down from cracks in the ceiling above. You've done it. Against all odds, you've defeated the High Cultist and closed the portal. Redstone is safe. The world is safe. For now.
defeat_description: Vexthar's Blight-enhanced power is too great. His shadow magic tears through your defenses, and one by one, your party members fall. As darkness claims you, the last thing you hear is Vexthar's triumphant laughter: 'The Shadow Blight rises. Your world falls. This is only the beginning.' The portal expands, shadow corruption pouring out like a flood. You have failed. Redstone - and perhaps the entire world - is doomed.
